title: trophis racemosa
intro: Trophis racemosa, also known as the "Coralillo" or "Matico", is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trophis racemosa include treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from fever, pain, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Trophis racemosa include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
